findings.title: Dependency not in lockfile
findings.evidence: ghost-payments-sdk@^1.0.0 added to dependencies but lockfile changes not shown in diff; package existence and intentional installation must be verified

findings.title: Postinstall script added without visibility into implementation
findings.evidence: postinstall script added (node scripts/bootstrap.js) but the script contents are not visible in diff; arbitrary code execution during install requires verification of script intent

notes: The diff shows only package.json changes; no lockfile updates are visible, which is consistent with the 'not in lockfile' flag. Unclear if lockfile was omitted from diff or genuinely not updated.
The postinstall script references scripts/bootstrap.js but that file is not in the diff, preventing assessment of what the bootstrap process actually does.

Both issues are context-dependent: ghost-payments-sdk may be a legitimate new payment SDK dependency, and bootstrap.js may be a legitimate setup script. Investigation should verify the package provenance and script contents.

evaluator.note: Benchmark v4 multi-model panel; blind, packet-only context.
